raw_consumer_statement:
Around the XXXX of XX/XX/XXXX, I called Barclays/Athleta to dispute a {$49.00} charge from XXXX. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I contacted Barclays/Athleta again to dispute the {$49.00} XXXX charge XXXX XXXX ) due to canceling the subscription. I spoke with XXXX. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, after no dispute proliferated on my Athleta/Barclays account , I called Athleta/Barclays again to follow-up on the dispute and for the first time I was given a dispute case number of # XXXX. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, after noticing the {$49.00} charge from XXXX had been re-charged to my Athleta Barclays account and XXXX having removed all of my music and disabling my account, I asked Athleta/Barclays again to refund me. They refused saying the dispute had been closed. 

As of XX/XX/XXXX, Barclays/Athleta charged me upwards of 3 or more times for the same {$49.00} transaction ( that I cancelled ) to reap interest and then refunded XXXX of the charges after interest charges were obtained and leaving XXXX of the {$49.00} charges, despite me continually informing Athleta Barclays that my account had been removed from XXXX and XXXX no XXXXXXXX XXXX were being provided and a refund is warranted.
